subject: Re: Fwd: Meeting
body:
stay out of it

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Do you know anything about transferring LHW security
> employees from  
> Corporate to household employees?
>  
> Should Peg meet with the Vorys people on Monday.
>  
> I have not been to NAPI for a few months.  Do you
> want me to try to  arrange 
> to be there for the meeting?
>  
> Please advise.
>  
> Darren
> > Date: Wed, 09 Nov 2005 15:32:11 -0500
> To: DKIESQ@aol.com
> From: Peg Ugland <pegu@naproperty.com>
> Subject: Meeting
> 
> Darren,
> Vorys attorney's are working on a way to take the
> security for the Wexner's 
> from Corporate to personal.  There are two teams at
> Vorys working on this - 
> one team for Household and one for Corporate.  The
> attorney's that are on 
> the Household team would like to meet with me this
> Monday to review the 
> benefits that the current household employees have. 
> Is this OK with Jeffrey?
> Thanks.
> Peg
> 
> 



	
		
__________________________________

body_html:
stay out of it

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Do you know anything about transferring LHW security
employees from
Corporate to household employees?

Should Peg meet with the Vorys people on Monday.

I have not been to NAPI for a few months. Do you
want me to try to arrange
to be there for the meeting?

Please advise.

Darren

Date: Wed, 09 Nov 2005 15:32:11 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Meeting

Darren,
Vorys attorney's are working on a way to take the
security for the Wexner's
from Corporate to personal. There are two teams at
Vorys working on this -
one team for Household and one for Corporate. The
attorney's that are on
the Household team would like to meet with me this
Monday to review the
benefits that the current household employees have.
Is this OK with Jeffrey?
Thanks.
Peg

Yahoo! Mail - PC Magazine Editors' Choice 2005
http://mail.yahoo.com
